title: Add Meshtastic app-compat protobuf exchange vectors
description: Why this exists: compatibility implementation needs source-backed golden vectors for current app flows before Zephyr or adapter code is written. What needs to be done: create vectors for BLE raw protobuf exchanges covering heartbeat, want_config_id 69420 config stage, want_config_id 69421 node DB stage, TEXT_MESSAGE_APP send, incoming TEXT_MESSAGE_APP, ROUTING_APP ACK/NAK with decoded.request_id, and oversized/unknown message handling. Acceptance criteria: vectors are generated from or validated against current Meshtastic protobuf schemas; Android/iOS/Python expectations are represented; tests consume the vectors or a follow-up implementation Bead is linked.
notes: 2026-06-30 added Meshtastic app-compat BLE protobuf exchange vectors in test/vectors/meshtastic_app_compat.json, generator support, schema support, README guidance, and Python drift/wire-shape tests. Covered heartbeat, want_config_id 69420 config stage, want_config_id 69421 node DB stage, legacy/Python full-sync nonce, TEXT_MESSAGE_APP send, unsupported PRIVATE_APP no-op/error, incoming TEXT_MESSAGE_APP, ROUTING_APP ACK, ROUTING_APP NAK with nested Routing.error_reason NO_ROUTE, BLE stream-prefix rejection, and oversized ToRadio rejection. Verification: PYTHONPATH=python/src python3 test/vectors/generate.py wrote 11 Meshtastic vectors; cd python && uv run python -m pytest tests/test_vectors.py passed 38/38; git diff --check passed; line-length guard passed. Initial review passes Hooke/Harvey/Sartre found invalid fixed32 nonce encoding, heartbeat bool encoding, missing FromRadio.id, self-consistency-only tests, missing NAK/unsupported coverage, empty oversized bytes, weak schema, and sys.path import risk. Fixed with uint32 varints, heartbeat as empty message, FromRadio.id, ACK+NAK, unsupported portnum, real 505-byte oversized vector, independent protobuf wire parser tests, sys.path.insert(0), and schema hardening. Re-review Epicurus/Feynman/Kuhn found NAK payload was UTF-8 instead of nested Meshtastic Routing protobuf and schema conditionals were under schc_vector; fixed NAK to Routing.error_reason NO_ROUTE payload bytes and moved conditionals under meshtastic_app_compat_vector. Final focused review Carson found no blocking P0/P1/P2 issues and verified NAK/schema/test fixes. Note: system python pytest is missing filelock via aiocoap.oscore; uv-managed test run passes.
close_reason: Added Meshtastic app-compat protobuf exchange vectors, generator/schema/test coverage, and completed review/fix cycle.
